/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/fe_rtp.dir/fe_rtp_multistream.cxx.o -o fe_rtp  /home/daq/packages/midas/lib/libmfe.a /home/daq/packages/midas/lib/libmidas.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so -lcurl -L/usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu -lmysqlclient -lz  -lzstd -lssl -lcrypto -lresolv -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so -lutil -lrt -ldl
